events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. An emergency egress fixture wired to a switched leg violates NEC 700.12/700.16 (emergency lighting must stay energized independent of local switches) and NFPA 101's continuous egress illumination requirement — a wall switch could disable required emergency lighting. Flagged for rework/re-termination onto an unswitched emergency circuit and re-inspection before closeout, and recommended checking nearby fixtures for the same miswiring.
